LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER CROWN CASTLE NG WEST INC.'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. CC'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BOARD OF APPEALS' ("BOARD") DECISION TO REVOKE CC'S PERMIT TO INSTALL A WIRELESS FACILITY IS SUPPORTED BY SUBSTANTIAL EVIDENCE IN THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD. THE BOARD DID NOT ABUSE ITS DISCRETION IN FINDING THAT CC'S PERMIT TO INSTALL A WIRELESS FACILITY DID NOT SATISFY THE "PLANNING PROTECTED LOCATION COMPATIBILITY STANDARD" AND "ZONING PROTECTED LOCATION COMPATIBILITY STANDARD" UNDER ARTICLE 25 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC WORKS CODE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Mtn For Writ Of Admin Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. SAM N. DAWOOD OF DAVIS WRIGHT & TREMAINE LLP, TEL. NO. 276-6566 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
ATTY. WILLIAM K. SANDERS, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, TEL. NO. 554-6771 APPEARING FOR THE RESPONDENT.

RULING - A R G U E D; PETITIONER CROWN CASTLE NG WEST INC.'s Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus is denied. CC's request for judicial notice is granted. The Court finds that the City and County of San Francisco Board of Appeals' ("Board") decision to revoke CC's permit to install a wireless facility is supported by substantial evidence in the Administrative Record. The Board did not abuse its discretion in finding that CC's permit to install a wireless facility did not satisfy the "Planning Protected Location Compatibility Standard" and "Zoning Protected Location Compatibility Standard" under Article 25 of the San Francisco Public Works Code. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Mtn For Writ Of Admin Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-04-2013 Continued To Oct-28-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PETITIONER CROWN CASTLE NG WEST INC.'S Motion For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
is continued on the Court's own motion to October 28, 2013. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =(302/PJB)
